title: uDdeAdvise
text: uDdeAdvise Registers an automatic link between Uniface and another application. Parameters in: $50 Service name $51 Topic name $52 Item name $53 Link item out: $status 0 =success, -1 =failure Description The receiveMessage trigger is activated on the server side if the data in the specified item changes on the client side (for example, by retrieving a new occurrence in the field), or when the valueChanged trigger is activated on the client side. $result contains the name of the warm link that fired the receiveMessage trigger. $status indicates whether the warm link was established or not. The exec operation is used here to establish the link, and the receiveMessage trigger is used to determine what data must be updated: operation exec $50="Calc" $51="wrksht.ods" $52="R1C1" $53="testlink" activate "udde".uDdeAdvise() if ($status=0) message "Link established" else message "Link was not established " endif end; exec operation Copy receiveMessage trigger if ($result="testlink") $50="Calc" $51="wrksht.ods" $52="R1C1" activate "udde".uDdeAdvise() if ($status=0) field.entity=$53 else message "Request did not succeed" endif endif Copy Related Links DDE Links Applications that communiicate via DDE do so using links that can be defined by copying and pasting them to the destination application or programming them using the DDE syntax rules.
